title: Brasiliorchis grobyoides
taxonomy: Brasiliorchis grobyoides is a genus within the Orchidaceae family and its classification would place it within the Asparagales order of flowering plants. This species is native to Brazil and is a type of terrestrial orchid. The classification of Brasiliorchis grobyoides reflects its evolutionary relationships with other orchids. It is often grouped with other Brasiliorchis species due to shared characteristics. Further classification may also involve subcategories, such as family and genus levels.
